topic: Evangelical Pastor's Claim vs. Reality of Immigration Policies
tweet1: Jeffress claims Trump has biblical authority, yet @ex_vandalz questions vegetarians secretly eating meat.
tweet2: @ex_vandalz said: 'Man, them vegetarians be in corners secretly eating meat. Or some meat "flavored" product.' Shows gap between moral claims and reality.
tweet3: @TheLaikYobaz (TX gov) tweets about children having insider info, highlighting contradictions in religious political rhetoric & policy enforcement.
tweet4: These gaps suggest religious leaders use selective moral logic to bolster politics. We need more transparency on such claims.
